You are an expert technical recruiter evaluating a candidate for a role. Evaluate the best match role against the resume. Return ONLY a valid JSON object with this exact structure: {"strengths": ["string", "string"], "weaknesses": ["string", "string"], "improvement_tips": ["string", "string"]}

Candidate Resume:
Shubhi Gupta                                                                                                 +91-8410074328

B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering (AI)
KIET Group of Institutions, Ghaziabad                                                                github.com/Shubhii05

                                                                                      linkedin.com/in/shubhigupta0504

Summary

3rd-year B.Tech student specializing in AI with hands-on experience building distributed systems, full-stack web
applications, and C++ engines. Skilled in Node.js, React, Docker, and PostgreSQL. Seeking SDE internship
opportunities to apply backend and systems knowledge in a production environment.

Education                                                                                                         2023ş2027
                                                                                                                 CGPA: 8.22
Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence)
KIET Group of Institutions                                                                                        2021ş2022
Intermediate Schooling                                                                                     Percentage: 93.5
Aligarh Muslim University
High School                                                                                                       2019ş2020
Aligarh Muslim University                                                                                  Percentage: 97.8

Technical Projects

ChronoQueue ş Distributed Video Processing Platform                                                        Feb 2026 ş May 2026

Distributed task queue system for asynchronous video processing using microservices architecture.

Built a scalable video processing platform using Node.js, Redis, Upstash, PostgreSQL, Supabase, and Docker,

supporting asynchronous execution across 3+ concurrent worker services.

Designed a Redis-backed distributed task queue with retry mechanisms, dead-letter handling, and real-time job

tracking, achieving 99%+ successful job processing reliability under concurrent workloads.

Containerized microservices with Docker and implemented horizontally scalable worker architecture, enabling 5Î

higher concurrent job throughput without architectural changes.

ResumeMatcher ş AI Resume Matching System                                                                  Oct 2025 ş Jan 2026

C++-based resume screening system for automated candidate-job matching and ranking.

Developed a resume matching engine in C++ using object-oriented design and STL data structures to evaluate

candidates across 10+ skill categories with weighted scoring logic.

Implemented keyword extraction, skill mapping, and ranking algorithms to automate candidate screening, reducing

manual filtering effort by an estimated 60%.

Built a modular REST API service using Crow and CMake with structured file parsing support, enabling scalable

integration with frontend applications and external job datasets.

Scoops ş Full-Stack Ice Cream E-Commerce Platform                                                          Dec 2024 ş Apr 2025

Full-stack web application with user authentication, session management, and real-time table reservation.

Developed a responsive frontend using React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, and Framer Motion with reusable compo-

nent architecture.

Implemented authentication workflows, REST API integration, and Redis-backed persistent cart synchronization.

Optimized performance and responsive design for seamless user experience across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.

Technical Skills

 Languages: C++, JavaScript, TypeScript, SQL, Python
 Frontend: React.js, HTML5, CSS3, TailwindCSS, Framer Motion
 Backend: Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs
 Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis
 Core Concepts: Data Structures & Algorithms, OOPS, DBMS, System Design, Microservices, Distributed Systems
 Tools: Git, GitHub, Docker, Linux, CI/CD, VS Code, Postman

Certifications

Palo Alto Networks Certified Network Security Administrator (PCNSA)                      Palo Alto Networks, 2024
                                                                                      Amazon Web Services, 2025
AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner  View Certificate

Position of Responsibility

Core Member ş Vpaksh (KIET Dramatics Society)                                                              2023şPresent

Led team coordination across 10+ member performances, winning EPOQUE and Prastuti events (2023).
Secured 1st Prize in Skit and Nukkad Natak at IIT Jodhpur and IIT Roorkee.

Attracted 300+ viewers per event across 5+ performances; raised over Rs. 20,000 through prize winnings.
